                         y.lb.major = c('0.01%', '0.03%', '0.1%', '0.3%', '1%', '3%', '10%'), y.brk.major = log10(c(0.01, 0.03, 0.1, 0.3, 1, 3, 10)),
                         y.log=FALSE, y.lims = c(-2.2, 1.2, 2),
                         footnote.cex=8,
                         legend.drop=FALSE, box.pos.only=TRUE, resp.plot = FALSE,
                       dot.size = 3, theme.base.size = 25,
                       page.title.cex = 20)


 today <- format(Sys.Date(), "%m%d%Y")
cairo_pdf(paste0("/trials/covpn/p3008/analysis/manuscripts/PartACorrelatesManuscript/report/CoVPN3008_figs11_spaghetti_",today,".pdf"), onefile = T, width = 15, height = 10)

pt_draw(boxplots_all11_a_b)
pt_draw(boxplots_all11_c_d)

 dev.off()
 

```


```{nab_violin_ris, eval = doctype != "docx"}
# source("../macro/cor_graphics_functions_partA.R")
ds.nab.ris <- ds %>%
  filter(ph2.m1.sera == 1 & IMMFL == "Y") 


#### read nab data 

nab.resp <- read.csv("../pdata/COVPN3008_NAB07_SA_20240705/pdata/COVPN3008_NAB07_SA_resp_long_20240711.csv") %>%
  filter(isolate == "BA.4/5" & aval_cd == "response_ID50" & visitno %in% c(2,3,4)) %>%
  mutate(Subjectid = paste0("C3008-", ptid),
         visitno = case_when(visitno == 2 ~ "M0",
                             visitno ==3 |visitno ==4 ~ "M1"),
         response = aval) %>%
  select("Subjectid", "visitno", "response") 

ds.nab.ris <- ds.nab.ris %>%
  select("Subjectid", "BBA45ID50", "M1BA45ID50", "AGRP2N") %>%
  rename(M0 = BBA45ID50,
         M1 = M1BA45ID50 ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("M"),
               names_to = "visitno",
               values_to = "value")


ds.tmp.nab <- left_join(ds.nab.ris,nab.resp) %>%
  mutate(cohort_event = AGRP2N,
         time = case_when(visitno == "M0" ~ "M0",
                          visitno == "M1" ~ "Peak"),
         panel = "nAb ID50 BA.4/5",
         assay = "nAb ID50 BA.4/5",
         value = log10(value))%>%
  mutate(cohort_event = factor(cohort_event, levels = c("1", "3",  "2.1" , "4.1")))



cohort_event = c("1", "2.1", "3", "4.1")
 


panel_list = unique(ds.tmp.nab$assay)
set_label = c("M0", "Peak")


## group by value for figure 1
groupby_vars1 = c("assay", "time","cohort_event")

ds.tmp.nab.plot <- get_desc_by_group(ds.tmp.nab, groupby_vars1) 



 violin.nab <- f_case_non_case_by_time_assay_nab(
    dat = ds.tmp.nab.plot ,
    assays = panel_list,
    times = set_label,
   axis.x.text.size = 40,
    strip.x.text.size = 40,
    strip.y.text.size = 20,
    panel.text.size = 13,
    axis.title.size = 25,
    facet.y.var = vars(), 
    facet.x.var = vars(time),
    pointby = "cohort_col",
    nrow=1,
    ncol=6,
    label_angle=0,
   y.lab.position = 6.5,
   y.label.text = "ID50 Titer (AU/mL)")
 

 
 
 
 
  today <- format(Sys.Date(), "%m%d%Y")
cairo_pdf(paste0("/trials/covpn/p3008/analysis/manuscripts/PartACorrelatesManuscript/report/CoVPN3008_nab_violin_RIS",today,".pdf"), onefile = T, width = 15, height = 10)

violin.nab
 dev.off()
 
```




```{bama_violin_ris, eval = doctype != "docx"}

ds.bama.ris <- ds %>%
  filter(ph2.m1.sera == 1 & IMMFL == "Y") 



ds.tmp.bama <- left_join(ds.bama.ris %>%
                      mutate(EventIndPrimary1 = case_when(EventIndPrimary1 == 0 ~ "Non-cases",
                                                           EventIndPrimary1 == 1 ~ "Cases")) %>%
  select("Subjectid", "BIGGMSDA15AU", "BIGGMSDA23AU", "M1IGGMSDA15AU", "M1IGGMSDA23AU", "EventIndPrimary1", "AGRP2N"),
  bama.resp) %>%
  mutate(BA23AU.resp = as.numeric(BA23AU.resp),
         M1A23AU.resp = as.numeric(M1A23AU.resp),
         BA15AU.resp = as.numeric(BA15AU.resp),
         M1A15AU.resp = as.numeric(M1A15AU.resp))


  
ds.bama.plot.resp <- ds.tmp.bama %>% 
  select(Subjectid, EventIndPrimary1, BA15AU.resp, BA23AU.resp, M1A15AU.resp, M1A23AU.resp,AGRP2N ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = contains("resp"),
               names_to = "assay",
               values_to = "response") %>%
  mutate(assay = case_when(assay == "BA15AU.resp" ~ "BIGGMSDA15AU",
                             assay == "BA23AU.resp" ~ "BIGGMSDA23AU",
                             assay == "M1A15AU.resp" ~ "M1IGGMSDA15AU",
                             assay == "M1A23AU.resp" ~ "M1IGGMSDA23AU"))
  
  
ds.bama.plot.value <- ds.tmp.bama %>% 
  select(Subjectid, EventIndPrimary1, BIGGMSDA15AU, BIGGMSDA23AU, M1IGGMSDA15AU, M1IGGMSDA23AU) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = BIGGMSDA15AU:M1IGGMSDA23AU ,
               names_to = "assay",
               values_to = "value") 
  
  
ds.bama.plot1 <- ds.bama.plot.resp %>% full_join(., ds.bama.plot.value)%>%
  mutate(cohort_event = AGRP2N,
         time = case_when(assay %in% c("BIGGMSDA15AU","BIGGMSDA23AU") ~ "M0",
                          assay %in% c("M1IGGMSDA15AU","M1IGGMSDA23AU") ~ "Peak"),
         panel =  case_when(assay %in% c("BIGGMSDA15AU","M1IGGMSDA15AU") ~ "IgG N Index",
                          assay %in% c("BIGGMSDA23AU","M1IGGMSDA23AU") ~ "IgG Spike BA.5"),
         assay= case_when(assay %in% c("BIGGMSDA15AU","M1IGGMSDA15AU") ~ "IgG N Index",
                          assay %in% c("BIGGMSDA23AU","M1IGGMSDA23AU") ~ "IgG Spike BA.5"),
         value = log10(value))%>%
  mutate(cohort_event = factor(cohort_event, levels = c("1", "3",  "2.1" , "4.1")))
  
  
  

cohort_event = c("1", "2.1", "3", "4.1")
 


panel_list = unique(ds.bama.plot1$assay)
set_label = c("M0", "Peak")


## group by value for figure 1
groupby_vars1 = c("assay", "time","cohort_event")

ds.bama.plot1 <- get_desc_by_group(ds.bama.plot1, groupby_vars1) 



 violin.bama <- f_case_non_case_by_time_assay_nab(
    dat = ds.bama.plot1 ,
    assays = panel_list,
    times = set_label,
   axis.x.text.size = 40,
    strip.x.text.size = 40,
    strip.y.text.size = 20,
    panel.text.size = 13,
    axis.title.size = 25,
    facet.y.var = vars(), 
    facet.x.var = vars(time),
    pointby = "cohort_col",
    nrow=1,
    ncol=6,
    label_angle=0,
   y.lab.position = 7,
   y.label.text = "IgG AU/mL")
 

 
 
 
   today <- format(Sys.Date(), "%m%d%Y")
cairo_pdf(paste0("/trials/covpn/p3008/analysis/manuscripts/PartACorrelatesManuscript/report/CoVPN3008_bama_violin_RIS",today,".pdf"), onefile = T, width = 15, height = 10)

 violin.bama
 dev.off()
 
```


```{fig_spp_violin_iggs, eval = doctype != "docx"}
#########
#  you need to make some new panels, for
# IgG Spike (Index strain)
# CD4 T cells IFNg and/or IL-2 Index strain peptides
# CD4 T cells IFNg and/or IL-2 and/or CD154 Index strain
# nAb ID50 D614G/Reference strain 


bama.resp.a16 <-  read.csv("../pdata/covpn3008_bammsd_20240206/pdata/CoVPN3008_BAMMSD_20240405_IQC_IgG.csv") %>%
  filter(analyte %in% c("SARS-CoV-2 Spike")  & aval_cd == "response") %>%
  filter(visitno %in% c(2, 3, 4)) %>%
  mutate(Subjectid = paste0("C3008-", ptid),
         visitno = case_when(visitno == 2 ~ "response_M0",
                             visitno ==3 |visitno ==4 ~ "response_M1")) %>%
  select("Subjectid", "visitno", "analyte", "aval") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = visitno, values_from = aval) %>%
  mutate(antigen.lab = "A16" )

bama.au.a16 <-  read.csv("../adata/COVID_bama_resp.csv") %>%
  filter(antigen.lab == "A16" ) %>%
    filter(visitno %in% c(2, 3, 4)) %>%
  mutate(Subjectid = paste0("C3008-", ptid),
         visitno = case_when(visitno == 2 ~ "obsconc_AU_tuc_M0",
                             visitno ==3 |visitno ==4 ~ "obsconc_AU_tuc_M1")) %>%
  select(Subjectid, antigen.lab, obsconc_AU_tuc, isotype, concentration_units,visitno, pos_cut) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = visitno, values_from = obsconc_AU_tuc)


bama.a16 <- bama.resp.a16 %>% full_join(bama.au.a16) %>%
  select(-analyte)


##### 3.If the M0 = neg, Peak resp = 1 (response by lab) ~ resp =1 at Peak
##### If the M0 = neg, Peak resp = 0 (by lab) ~ resp = 0 at Peak
##### If M0 = pos and Peak resp = 1 and need to 4 folder increase ~ resp at Peak =1
##### If M0 = pos ~ Peak resp = 1 and change less 4 fold ~ resp at Peak = 0 

bama.a16 <- bama.a16 %>%
  mutate(au_ratio = obsconc_AU_tuc_M1/obsconc_AU_tuc_M0) %>%
  mutate(response_M1_adj = case_when(response_M0 == 0 & response_M1 == 0 ~ 0,
                                     response_M0 == 0 & response_M1 == 1 ~ 1,
                                     response_M0 == 1 & response_M1 == 0 ~ 0,
                                     response_M0 == 1 & response_M1 == 1 & au_ratio >= 4 ~ 1,
                                     response_M0 == 1 & response_M1 == 1 & au_ratio < 4 ~ 0)) %>%
  select(Subjectid, antigen.lab, response_M0, response_M1_adj) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = antigen.lab, values_from = c(response_M0, response_M1_adj)) %>%
  rename(BA16AU.resp  = response_M0_A16,
         M1A16AU.resp = response_M1_adj_A16)



# #### read nab data 
# 
# nab.resp <- read.csv("../pdata/COVPN3008_NAB07_SA_20240705/pdata/COVPN3008_NAB07_SA_resp_long_20240711.csv") %>%
#   filter(isolate == "BA.4/5" & aval_cd == "response_ID50" & visitno %in% c(2,3,4)) %>%
#   mutate(Subjectid = paste0("C3008-", ptid),
#          visitno = case_when(visitno == 2 ~ "BBA45ID50.resp",
#                              visitno ==3 |visitno ==4 ~ "M1BA45ID50.resp")) %>%
#   select("Subjectid", "visitno", "aval") %>%
#   pivot_wider(names_from = visitno, values_from = aval)


ds.tmp.seru.a16 <- left_join(ds.seru %>%
                      mutate(EventIndPrimary1 = case_when(EventIndPrimary1 == 0 ~ "Non-cases",
                                                           EventIndPrimary1 == 1 ~ "Cases")) %>%
  select("Subjectid", "BIGGMSDA15AU", "BIGGMSDA16AU", "M1IGGMSDA16AU",  "EventIndPrimary1", "VACCINE_f"),
  bama.a16) %>%
  mutate(BA16AU.resp = as.numeric(BA16AU.resp),
         M1A16AU.resp = as.numeric(M1A16AU.resp))


ds.seru.plot.resp.a16 <- ds.tmp.seru.a16 %>% 
  select(Subjectid, EventIndPrimary1, VACCINE_f, BA16AU.resp, M1A16AU.resp ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = contains("resp"),
               names_to = "assay",
               values_to = "response") %>%
  mutate(assay = case_when(assay == "BA16AU.resp" ~ "BIGGMSDA16AU",
                             assay == "M1A16AU.resp" ~ "M1IGGMSDA16AU"))
  
  
ds.seru.plot.value.a16 <- ds.tmp.seru.a16 %>% 
  select(Subjectid, EventIndPrimary1, VACCINE_f, BIGGMSDA16AU, M1IGGMSDA16AU) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = BIGGMSDA16AU:M1IGGMSDA16AU ,
               names_to = "assay",
               values_to = "value") 
  
  
ds.seru.plot.a16 <- ds.seru.plot.resp.a16 %>% full_join(., ds.seru.plot.value.a16)%>%
  mutate(panel = "Serum assay", #only for title use
         cohort_event = EventIndPrimary1, # cohort_event is the the x-axis group variable
         time = assay,
         cohort_event = factor(cohort_event, levels = c("Cases", "Non-cases")),
         value = log10(value))

cohort_event = c("Cases", "Non-cases")


### generate (A) IgG Spike (Index strain) M0 Hybrid
ds.seru.plot.a16 <- ds.seru.plot.a16 %>%
  filter(VACCINE_f == "Hybrid") %>%
  filter(assay %in% c("BIGGMSDA16AU")) %>%
  mutate(assay_lab = case_when(assay == "BIGGMSDA16AU" ~ "AU/mL"),
         fig_num = case_when(  assay == "BIGGMSDA16AU" ~ "supp7.A")) %>%
  mutate(panel = case_when(assay == "BIGGMSDA16AU" ~ "M0 IgG Spike (Index strain)"),
         assay = factor(assay, levels = c("BIGGMSDA16AU"))) %>%
  arrange(assay)

panel_list = unique(ds.seru.plot.a16$assay)

## group by value for figure 1
groupby_vars1 = c("assay", "cohort_event")

ds.seru.plot.a16 <- get_desc_by_group(ds.seru.plot.a16, groupby_vars1) 



 violinsupp7.a <- f_case_non_case_by_time_assay(
    dat = ds.seru.plot.a16 ,
    assays = panel_list,
    times = panel_list,
    axis.x.text.size = 40,
    strip.x.text.size = 40,
    strip.y.text.size = 40,
    panel.text.size = 20,
    axis.title.size = 30,
    facet.y.var = vars(), 
    facet.x.var = vars(),
    pointby = "cohort_col",
    nrow=2,
    ncol=2,
    label_angle=0,
    y.lab.position = 7)
 
 
 violinsupp7.a

 
```




```{fig_cor_cd4, eval = doctype != "docx"}
source("../macro/my_pairs.R")



if(T){#Extra Functions
  
  ###Code copied from PerformanceAnalytics:::chart.Correlation
  ###The original function has the x-axis, y-axis labels on the histgrams which are hard to read
  ###Modified to add labels on x-axis and y-axis 
  
  panel.cor <- function(x, y, digits = 2, prefix = "", use = "pairwise.complete.obs", 
                        method="spearman", cex.cor, ...) {
    usr <- par("usr")
    on.exit(par(usr))
    par(usr = c(0, 1, 0, 1))
    r <- cor(x, y, use = use, method = method)
    txt <- format(c(r, 0.123456789), digits = digits)[1]
    txt <- paste(prefix, txt, sep = "")
    if (missing(cex.cor)) 
      cex <- 0.8/strwidth(txt)
    test <- cor.test(x, y, method = method)
    Signif <- symnum(test$p.value, corr = FALSE, na = FALSE, 
                     cutpoints = c(0, 0.001, 0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 1), symbols = c("***", 
                                                                              "**", "*", ".", " "))
    text(0.5, 0.5, txt, cex = cex )
    text(0.8, 0.8, Signif, cex = cex, col = 2)
  }
  

  hist.panel = function(x, ...) {
    par(new = TRUE)
    hist(x, col = "light gray", probability = TRUE, axes = FALSE, 
         main = "", breaks = "FD")

    lines(density(x, na.rm = TRUE), col = "red", lwd = 1)
    rug(x)
  }
  
  panel.smooth =function (x, y, col = par("col"), bg = NA, pch = par("pch"), 
                          cex = 1, col.smooth = "red", span = 2/3, iter = 3, ...) {
    points(x, y, pch = pch, col = col, bg = bg, cex = cex)
    
    ok <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
    if (any(ok)) 
      lines(stats::lowess(x[ok], y[ok], f = span, iter = iter), 
            col = col.smooth, ...)
    
  }
  
  draw.plot=function(vars,lgnd,title,protocol){  

    varsub=as.vector(unlist(
      sapply(vars,function(x)names(allassay_sub[grep(x,names(allassay_sub))]))
      ))
    
    df=allassay_sub[,varsub]
    
    labels=varsub
    
    pairs(df, gap = 0, lower.panel = panel.smooth, upper.panel = panel.cor, pch=19,
          diag.panel = hist.panel,text.panel= NULL ,oma=c(16,16,8,4), ylim = c(-2, 1.2), xlim = c(-2, 1.2))
    
    title(paste0("CoVPN ",protocol," Correlation Analysis: ",title))
    vars.n=sapply(vars,function(x)length(grep(x,names(allassay_sub))))
    cols=rep.int(c("black","black","black","black","black","black","black","black")[1:length(vars)],vars.n)
    
    start.x=par('usr')[1]+(par('usr')[2]-par('usr')[1])/11.5*1.7
    end.x=par('usr')[2]-(par('usr')[2]-par('usr')[1])/11.5*.5
    start.x1=start.x+(end.x-start.x)/2/ncol(df)
    end.x1=end.x-(end.x-start.x)/2/ncol(df)
    fix.y=par('usr')[3]+(par('usr')[4]-par('usr')[3])/8.5*ifelse(ncol(df)<3,2.2,1.8)*0.8
    
    
    start.y=par('usr')[4]-(par('usr')[4]-par('usr')[3])/8.5*1.05
    end.y=par('usr')[3]+(par('usr')[4]-par('usr')[3])/8.5*1.7
    start.y1=start.y+(end.y-start.y)/2/ncol(df)
    end.y1=end.y-(end.y-start.y)/2/ncol(df)
    fix.x=par('usr')[1]+(par('usr')[2]-par('usr')[1])/11.5*ifelse(ncol(df)<3,2.2,1.8)*0.7
    
    par(font=2)
    text(x=seq(start.x1,end.x1,length.out=ncol(df)),y=fix.y,
         col=cols,xpd=T,cex=.7,adj=0,srt=-60,
         labels=labels)
    
    text(y=seq(start.y1,end.y1,length.out=ncol(df)),x=fix.x,
         col=cols,xpd=T,cex=.7,adj=1,
         labels=labels)
    
    par(xpd=T)

    legend(x=par('usr')[1]+(par('usr')[2]-par('usr')[1])/11.5*0.5,
           y=par('usr')[3]+(par('usr')[4]-par('usr')[3])/19*(1+.15*length(vars)),
           ncol=3,cex=.85,bty="n",text.width=rep.int(max(strwidth(lgnd)),(1+length(lgnd))),
           c("0 *** 0.001 ** 0.01 * 0.05 \u00B7"),
           fill=c("red"),
           border=NA)
    
    par(font=1)
  }
  
}# End of Extra Functions



ds.tmp.ics.wide <- ds.tmp.ics %>% 
  mutate(antigen = case_when(antigen == "Spike Wuhan" ~ "Spike Index",
                             antigen == "Wuhan N" ~ "N Index",
                             TRUE ~ antigen)) %>%
  mutate(assay = paste0(cytokine, "\n", antigen, " CD4+")) %>%
  mutate(value = log10(pctpos_adj)) %>%
  select(-cytokine, -antigen,  - response, - vacc.response, -pctpos_adj, -tcellsub) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = assay,
              values_from = value)

ds.tmp.ics.wide.8 <- ds.tmp.ics.8 %>% 
    mutate(value = log10(pctpos_adj)) %>%
    mutate(antigen = case_when(antigen == "Spike Wuhan" ~ "Spike Index",
                             antigen == "Wuhan N" ~ "N Index",
                             TRUE ~ antigen)) %>%
  mutate(assay = paste0(cytokine, "\n", antigen, " CD8+")) %>%
  select(-cytokine, -antigen,- response, -pctpos_adj, -tcellsub) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = assay,
              values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(visitno = case_when(visitno == "M0" ~ "M0",
                             visitno == "Peak" ~ "M1"))


ds.tmp.ics.wide.all <- ds.tmp.ics.wide %>%
  full_join(., ds.tmp.ics.wide.8, by = join_by(Subjectid, EventIndPrimary1, VACCINE_f, AGRP2N, labid, ptid, visitno)) %>%
  filter(VACCINE_f == "Hybrid")


   today <- format(Sys.Date(), "%m%d%Y")
cairo_pdf(paste0("/trials/covpn/p3008/analysis/manuscripts/PartACorrelatesManuscript/report/CoVPN3008_ICS_corr_",today,".pdf"), onefile = T, width = 15, height = 10)


allassay_sub <- ds.tmp.ics.wide.all %>%
  filter(visitno =="M0")


draw.plot(vars=c("IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike BA.4/5 CD4+" , "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nSpike BA.4/5 CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike Index CD4+",
                 "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nSpike Index CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nBA.4-5 N CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nBA.4-5 N CD4+",
                 "IFNg_OR_IL2\nN Index CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nN Index CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike BA.4/5 CD8+",
                 "IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike Index CD8+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nBA.4-5 N CD8+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nN Index CD8+"),
          lgnd=c("IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike BA.4/5 CD4+" , "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nSpike BA.4/5 CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike Index CD4+",
                 "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nSpike Index CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nBA.4-5 N CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nBA.4-5 N CD4+",
                 "IFNg_OR_IL2\nN Index CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nN Index CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike BA.4/5 CD8+",
                 "IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike Index CD8+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nBA.4-5 N CD8+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nN Index CD8+") ,
          protocol=3008,title=paste0("M0, Cohort: Hybrid PLWH"))



allassay_sub <- ds.tmp.ics.wide.all %>%
  filter(visitno =="M1")


draw.plot(vars=c("IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike BA.4/5 CD4+" , "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nSpike BA.4/5 CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike Index CD4+",
                 "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nSpike Index CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nBA.4-5 N CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nBA.4-5 N CD4+",
                 "IFNg_OR_IL2\nN Index CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nN Index CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike BA.4/5 CD8+",
                 "IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike Index CD8+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nBA.4-5 N CD8+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nN Index CD8+"),
          lgnd=c("IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike BA.4/5 CD4+" , "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nSpike BA.4/5 CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike Index CD4+",
                 "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nSpike Index CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nBA.4-5 N CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nBA.4-5 N CD4+",
                 "IFNg_OR_IL2\nN Index CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2_OR_154\nN Index CD4+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike BA.4/5 CD8+",
                 "IFNg_OR_IL2\nSpike Index CD8+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nBA.4-5 N CD8+", "IFNg_OR_IL2\nN Index CD8+") ,
          protocol=3008,title=paste0("M1, Cohort: Hybrid PLWH"))



 dev.off()
 


```





```{fig_cor_cd8, eval = doctype != "docx"}



allassay_sub <- ds.tmp.ics.wide.8  filter(visitno == "M0") %>%


draw.plot(vars=c("IFNg_OR_IL2 Spike BA.4/5", "IFNg_OR_IL2 Spike Wuhan",  "IFNg_OR_IL2 BA.4-5 N", "IFNg_OR_IL2 Wuhan N"),
          lgnd=c("IFNg_OR_IL2 Spike BA.4/5", "IFNg_OR_IL2 Spike Wuhan",  "IFNg_OR_IL2 BA.4-5 N", "IFNg_OR_IL2 Wuhan N") ,
          protocol=3008,title=paste0(""))



```
